top_sources.top_context: enuinely struggle to eat + need appetite help before meals - Most people have opposite problem ### Better alternative - **Ipamorelin + CJC-1295 no DAC** - All ghrelin/pituitary benefits without prolactin spike, cortisol bump, or hunger - Stronger, more sustained, more selective GH release ## #3 — HGH Fragment 176-191 ### Why it's overrated - Unmodified C-terminal fragment of HGH (basically AOD without tyrosine modification) - **Worse than AOD-9604** — AOD at least had clinical trials - HGH Frag = almost no human clinical data, marketed as "pure fat-burning fragment" - Still listed on many research site
